reply.subject: Re: Ansa document scenario 01_hsa-selected-no-hsa-form 01_hsa-selected-no-hsa-form-1784643043746
reply.text:

1. HSA appears to be selected, but no HSA source document or administrator details were found. Please attach the HSA source materials or provide the account administrator/custodian and employer-specific account details.

Reply in plain language with whatever you know, or attach source documents that contain the answers. I’ll use the new information and continue from there.
